text.title: Cost Estimation Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply Cost Estimation end-to-end. Each step names input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: wbs-decompose
step.action: Decompose into WBS leaves; each carries success criterion.

step.name: three-point-estimate
step.action: Per leaf: assign O/M/P with citation. Compute PERT mean.
step.decision-gate: If historical citation missing, STOP and reject.

step.name: risk-register-link
step.action: For each risk, propose contingency line with amount + rationale.
step.decision-gate: If risk has no $ impact estimate, defer.

step.name: management-reserve-size
step.action: Size management reserve as % of (mean cost + contingency).
step.decision-gate: If novelty/regulation high, size reserve ≥15% of mean+contingency.

step.name: compute-totals-and-validate
step.action: Compute total_mean + total_pessimistic. Run validator. Emit baseline.
step.decision-gate: If validator fails, fix before sending to buyer.
